violations.text: Ice observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

Food was observed thawing on the counter in a container of stagnant water. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

The doors to the outside, located in the receiving area, are not tight-fitting. Space observed at the bottom of the doors. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2025
Robot coupe is not in good repair. Cover is cracked and blade is pitted. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (mixer, knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2024
Spray bottle used for storing chemical taken from bulk supplies was not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (Robot Coupe) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023

Deli turkey observed not marked with the date of slicing/preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods sliced/prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023

The door to the outside, located in the receiving area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/13/2023
